uniqueSection.title: What Makes Us Unique
uniqueSection.subtitle: Our unconventional methodologies bring success to our students!

items.title: Tailored to Latest Syllabus
items.description: Our curriculum is always updated to match the latest MOE syllabus requirements.

items.title: Live and Recorded Classes
items.description: Flexible learning with both live interactive sessions and recorded lessons for revision.

items.title: Fast & Systematic Methodologies
items.description: Learn using our proven Fast & Systematic and Testing methodologies backed by brain research.

items.title: Highly Experienced Tutors
items.description: Teacher Violet & Team have over 20 years of teaching experience and have coached 1,800+ students.

items.title: Affordable Education
items.description: Quality education at competitive rates so every family can access excellent tutoring.

items.title: Motivational Methods
items.description: We inspire and motivate students to develop intrinsic drive for academic excellence.
